case_title: RONALD HENDERSON VS. TOSHIKO COVELLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR LYLE C. CAVIN, JR..
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH SIDE TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS AND FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100102068)
ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE.
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE SEP-19-2019.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT COVELLO, TOSHIKO DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUL-10-2019 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-08-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-17-2019
NOTICE AND ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT, SIGNED MAR-20-2019, SERVED FEB-22-2019 (TRANSACTION ID # 100067804) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HENDERSON, RONALD AS TO DEFENDANT COVELLO, TOSHIKO
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR SEP-09-2019. THE JUL-10-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR DEAN ANTHONY ALPER APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-20-2019 THROUGH DEC-19-2019.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100071967) FILED BY DEFENDANT COVELLO, TOSHIKO
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100071967) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT COVELLO, TOSHIKO
